Genesis1:1 In the beginning God created the heavens and the earth.
Genesis1:2 And the earth was waste and void; and darkness was upon the face of the deep: and the Spirit of God moved upon the face of the waters.
Genesis1:3 And God said
Genesis1:4 And God saw the light
Genesis1:5 And God called the light Day
Genesis1:6 And God said
Genesis1:7 And God made the firmament
Genesis1:8 And God called the firmament Heaven. And there was evening and there was morning
Genesis1:9 And God said
Genesis1:10 And God called the dry land Earth; and the gathering together of the waters called he Seas: and God saw that it was good.
Genesis1:11 And God said
Genesis1:12 And the earth brought forth grass
Genesis1:13 And there was evening and there was morning
Genesis1:14 And God said
Genesis1:15 and let them be for lights in the firmament of heaven to give light upon the earth: and it was so.
Genesis1:16 And God made the two great lights; the greater light to rule the day
Genesis1:17 And God set them in the firmament of heaven to give light upon the earth
Genesis1:18 and to rule over the day and over the night
Genesis1:19 And there was evening and there was morning
Genesis1:20 And God said
Genesis1:21 And God created the great sea-monsters
Genesis1:22 And God blessed them
Genesis1:23 And there was evening and there was morning
Genesis1:24 And God said
Genesis1:25 And God made the beasts of the earth after their kind
Genesis1:26 And God said
Genesis1:27 And God created man in his own image
Genesis1:28 And God blessed them: and God said unto them
Genesis1:29 And God said
Genesis1:30 and to every beast of the earth
Genesis1:31 And God saw everything that he had made
Genesis2:1 And the heavens and the earth were finished
Genesis2:2 And on the seventh day God finished his work which he had made; and he rested on the seventh day from all his work which he had made.
Genesis2:3 And God blessed the seventh day
Genesis2:4 These are the generations of the heavens and of the earth when they were created
Genesis2:5 And no plant of the field was yet in the earth
Genesis2:6 but there went up a mist from the earth
Genesis2:7 And Jehovah God formed man of the dust of the ground
Genesis2:8 And Jehovah God planted a garden eastward
Genesis2:9 And out of the ground made Jehovah God to grow every tree that is pleasant to the sight
Genesis2:10 And a river went out of Eden to water the garden; and from thence it was parted
Genesis2:11 The name of the first is Pishon: that is it which compasseth the whole land of Havilah
Genesis2:12 and the gold of that land is good: there is bdellium and the onyx stone.
Genesis2:13 And the name of the second river is Gihon: the same is it that compasseth the whole land of Cush.
Genesis2:14 And the name of the third river is Hiddekel: that is it which goeth in front of Assyria. And the fourth river is the Euphrates.
Genesis2:15 And Jehovah God took the man
Genesis2:16 And Jehovah God commanded the man
Genesis2:17 but of the tree of the knowledge of good and evil
Genesis2:18 And Jehovah God said
Genesis2:19 And out of the ground Jehovah God formed every beast of the field
Genesis2:20 And the man gave names to all cattle
Genesis2:21 And Jehovah God caused a deep sleep to fall upon the man
Genesis2:22 and the rib
Genesis2:23 And the man said
Genesis2:24 Therefore shall a man leave his father and his mother
Genesis2:25 And they were both naked

Genesis3:2 And the woman said unto the serpent
Genesis3:3 but of the fruit of the tree which is in the midst of the garden
Genesis3:4 And the serpent said unto the woman
Genesis3:5 for God doth know that in the day ye eat thereof
Genesis3:6 And when the woman saw that the tree was good for food
Genesis3:7 And the eyes of them both were opened
Genesis3:8 And they heard the voice of Jehovah God walking in the garden in the cool of the day: and the man and his wife hid themselves from the presence of Jehovah God amongst the trees of the garden.
Genesis3:9 And Jehovah God called unto the man
Genesis3:10 And he said
Genesis3:11 And he said
Genesis3:12 And the man said

Genesis3:19 in the sweat of thy face shalt thou eat bread
Genesis3:20 And the man called his wifes name Eve; because she was the mother of all living.

Genesis3:22 And Jehovah God said
Genesis3:23 therefore Jehovah God sent him forth from the garden of Eden
Genesis3:24 So he drove out the man; and he placed at the east of the garden of Eden the Cherubim
Genesis4:1 And the man knew Eve his wife; and she conceived
Genesis4:2 And again she bare his brother Abel. And Abel was a keeper of sheep
Genesis4:3 And in process of time it came to pass
Genesis4:4 And Abel
Genesis4:5 but unto Cain and to his offering he had not respect. And Cain was very wroth
Genesis4:6 And Jehovah said unto Cain
Genesis4:7 If thou doest well
Genesis4:8 And Cain told Abel his brother. And it came to pass
Genesis4:9 And Jehovah said unto Cain
Genesis4:10 And he said
Genesis4:11 And now cursed art thou from the ground
Genesis4:12 when thou tillest the ground
Genesis4:13 And Cain said unto Jehovah
Genesis4:14 Behold
Genesis4:15 And Jehovah said unto him
Genesis4:16 And Cain went out from the presence of Jehovah
Genesis4:17 And Cain knew his wife; and she conceived
Genesis4:18 And unto Enoch was born Irad: and Irad begat Mehujael: and Mehujael begat Methushael; and Methushael begat Lamech.
Genesis4:19 And Lamech took unto him two wives: the name of the one was Adah
Genesis4:20 And Adah bare Jabal: he was the father of such as dwell in tents and have cattle.
Genesis4:21 And his brothers name was Jubal: he was the father of all such as handle the harp and pipe.
Genesis4:22 And Zillah

Genesis5:1 This is the book of the generations of Adam. In the day that God created man
Genesis5:2 male and female created he them
Genesis5:3 And Adam lived a hundred and thirty years
Genesis5:4 and the days of Adam after he begat Seth were eight hundred years: and he begat sons and daughters.
Genesis5:5 And all the days that Adam lived were nine hundred and thirty years: and he died.
Genesis5:6 And Seth lived a hundred and five years
Genesis5:7 and Seth lived after he begat Enosh eight hundred and seven years
Genesis5:8 and all the days of Seth were nine hundred and twelve years: and he died.
Genesis5:9 And Enosh lived ninety years
Genesis5:10 and Enosh lived after he begat Kenan eight hundred and fifteen years
Genesis5:11 and all the days of Enosh were nine hundred and five years: and he died.
Genesis5:12 And Kenan lived seventy years
Genesis5:13 and Kenan lived after he begat Mahalalel eight hundred and forty years
Genesis5:14 and all the days of Kenan were nine hundred and ten years: and he died.
Genesis5:15 And Mahalalel lived sixty and five years
Genesis5:16 And Mahalalel lived after he begat Jared eight hundred and thirty years
Genesis5:17 and all the days of Mahalalel were eight hundred ninety and five years: and he died.
Genesis5:18 And Jared lived a hundred sixty and two years
Genesis5:19 and Jared lived after he begat Enoch eight hundred years
Genesis5:20 And all the days of Jared were nine hundred sixty and two years: and he died.
Genesis5:21 And Enoch lived sixty and five years
Genesis5:22 and Enoch walked with God after he begat Methuselah three hundred years
Genesis5:23 and all the days of Enoch were three hundred sixty and five years:
Genesis5:24 and Enoch walked with God: and he was not; for God took him.
Genesis5:25 And Methuselah lived a hundred eighty and seven years
Genesis5:26 and Methuselah lived after he begat Lamech seven hundred eighty and two years
Genesis5:27 And all the days of Methuselah were nine hundred sixty and nine years: and he died.
Genesis5:28 And Lamech lived a hundred eighty and two years
Genesis5:29 and he called his name Noah
Genesis5:30 And Lamech lived after he begat Noah five hundred ninety and five years
Genesis5:31 And all the days of Lamech were seven hundred seventy and seven years: and he died.
Genesis5:32 And Noah was five hundred years old: And Noah begat Shem
Genesis6:1 And it came to pass
Genesis6:2 that the sons of God saw the daughters of men that they were fair; and they took them wives of all that they chose.
Genesis6:3 And Jehovah said
Genesis6:4 The Nephilim were in the earth in those days
Genesis6:5 And Jehovah saw that the wickedness of man was great in the earth
Genesis6:6 And it repented Jehovah that he had made man on the earth
Genesis6:7 And Jehovah said
Genesis6:8 But Noah found favor in the eyes of Jehovah.

Genesis6:10 And Noah begat three sons
Genesis6:11 And the earth was corrupt before God

Genesis6:17 And I
Genesis6:18 But I will establish my covenant with thee; and thou shalt come into the ark

Genesis6:20 Of the birds after their kind
Genesis6:21 And take thou unto thee of all food that is eaten
Genesis6:22 Thus did Noah; according to all that God commanded him

Genesis7:14 they

Genesis7:18 And the waters prevailed
Genesis7:19 And the waters prevailed exceedingly upon the earth; and all the high mountains that were under the whole heaven were covered.
Genesis7:20 Fifteen cubits upward did the waters prevail; and the mountains were covered.
Genesis7:21 And all flesh died that moved upon the earth
Genesis7:22 all in whose nostrils was the breath of the spirit of life
Genesis7:23 And every living thing was destroyed that was upon the face of the ground
Genesis7:24 And the waters prevailed upon the earth a hundred and fifty days.

Genesis8:2 the fountains also of the deep and the windows of heaven were stopped
Genesis8:3 and the waters returned from off the earth continually: and after the end of a hundred and fifty days the waters decreased.

Genesis8:5 And the waters decreased continually until the tenth month: in the tenth month
Genesis8:6 And it came to pass at the end of forty days
Genesis8:7 and he sent forth a raven
Genesis8:8 And he sent forth a dove from him
Genesis8:9 but the dove found no rest for the sole of her foot
Genesis8:10 And he stayed yet other seven days; and again he sent forth the dove out of the ark;
Genesis8:11 and the dove came in to him at eventide; and
Genesis8:12 And he stayed yet other seven days
Genesis8:13 And it came to pass in the six hundred and first year

Exodus21:1 Now these are the ordinances which thou shalt set before them.

Exodus21:16 And he that stealeth a man
Exodus21:17 And he that curseth his father or his mother

Exodus21:19 if he rise again

Exodus21:23 But if any harm follow

Exodus21:25 burning for burning

Exodus21:27 And if he smite out his man-servants tooth
Exodus21:28 And if an ox gore a man or a woman to death

Exodus21:30 If there be laid on him a ransom
Exodus21:31 Whether it have gored a son

Exodus22:2 If the thief be found breaking in
Exodus22:3 If the sun be risen upon him

Exodus23:1 Thou shalt not take up a false report: put not thy hand with the wicked to be an unrighteous witness.
Exodus23:2 Thou shalt not follow a multitude to do evil; neither shalt thou speak in a cause to turn aside after a multitude to wrest justice:
Exodus23:3 neither shalt thou favor a poor man in his cause.
Exodus23:4 If thou meet thine enemys ox or his ass going astray
Exodus23:5 If thou see the ass of him that hateth thee lying under his burden
Exodus23:6 Thou shalt not wrest the justice due to thy poor in his cause.
Exodus23:7 Keep thee far from a false matter; and the innocent and righteous slay thou not: for I will not justify the wicked.
Exodus23:8 And thou shalt take no bribe: for a bribe blindeth them that have sight
Exodus23:9 And a sojourner shalt thou not oppress: for ye know the heart of a sojourner
Exodus23:10 And six years thou shalt sow thy land
Exodus23:11 but the seventh year thou shalt let it rest and lie fallow; that the poor of thy people may eat: and what they leave the beast of the field shall eat. In like manner thou shalt deal with thy vineyard
Exodus23:12 Six days thou shalt do thy work
Exodus23:13 And in all things that I have said unto you take ye heed: and make no mention of the name of other gods
Exodus23:14 Three times thou shalt keep a feast unto me in the year.
Exodus23:15 The feast of unleavened bread shalt thou keep: seven days thou shalt eat unleavened bread
Exodus23:16 and the feast of harvest
Exodus23:17 Three times in the year all thy males shall appear before the Lord Jehovah.
Exodus23:18 Thou shalt not offer the blood of my sacrifice with leavened bread; neither shall the fat of my feast remain all night until the morning.
Exodus23:19 The first of the first-fruits of thy ground thou shalt bring into the house of Jehovah thy God. Thou shalt not boil a kid in it mothers milk.
Exodus23:20 Behold
Exodus23:21 Take ye heed before him
Exodus23:22 But if thou shalt indeed hearken unto his voice
Exodus23:23 For mine angel shall go before thee
Exodus23:24 Thou shalt not bow down to their gods
Exodus23:25 And ye shall serve Jehovah your God
Exodus23:26 There shall none cast her young
Exodus23:27 I will send my terror before thee
Exodus23:28 And I will send the hornet before thee
Exodus23:29 I will not drive them out from before thee in one year
Exodus23:30 By little and little I will drive them out from before thee
Exodus23:31 And I will set thy border from the Red Sea even unto the sea of the Philistines
Exodus23:32 Thou shalt make no covenant with them
Exodus23:33 They shall not dwell in thy land

Leviticus1:2 Speak unto the children of Israel
Leviticus1:3 If his oblation be a burnt-offering of the herd
Leviticus1:4 And he shall lay his hand upon the head of the burnt-offering; and it shall be accepted for him to make atonement for him.
Leviticus1:5 And he shall kill the bullock before Jehovah: and Aarons sons
Leviticus1:6 And he shall flay the burnt-offering
Leviticus1:7 And the sons of Aaron the priest shall put fire upon the altar
Leviticus1:8 and Aarons sons
Leviticus1:9 but its inwards and its legs shall he wash with water: and the priest shall burn the whole on the altar
Leviticus1:10 And if his oblation be of the flock
Leviticus1:11 And he shall kill it on the side of the altar northward before Jehovah: and Aarons sons
Leviticus1:12 And he shall cut it into its pieces
Leviticus1:13 but the inwards and the legs shall he wash with water; and the priest shall offer the whole
Leviticus1:14 And if his oblation to Jehovah be a burnt-offering of birds
Leviticus1:15 And the priest shall bring it unto the altar
Leviticus1:16 and he shall take away its crop with the filth thereof
Leviticus1:17 and he shall rend it by the wings thereof
Leviticus2:1 And when any one offereth an oblation of a meal-offering unto Jehovah
Leviticus2:2 and he shall bring it to Aarons sons the priests; and he shall take thereout his handful of the fine flour thereof
Leviticus2:3 and that which is left of the meal-offering shall be Aarons and his sons: it is a thing most holy of the offerings of Jehovah made by fire.
Leviticus2:4 And when thou offerest an oblation of a meal-offering baken in the oven
Leviticus2:5 And if thy oblation be a meal-offering of the baking-pan
Leviticus2:6 Thou shalt part it in pieces
Leviticus2:7 And if thy oblation be a meal-offering of the frying-pan
Leviticus2:8 And thou shalt bring the meal-offering that is made of these things unto Jehovah: and it shall be presented unto the priest
Leviticus2:9 And the priest shall take up from the meal-offering the memorial thereof
Leviticus2:10 And that which is left of the meal-offering shall be Aarons and his sons: it is a thing most holy of the offerings of Jehovah made by fire.
Leviticus2:11 No meal-offering
Leviticus2:12 As an oblation of first -fruits ye shall offer them unto Jehovah: but they shall not come up for a sweet savor on the altar.
Leviticus2:13 And every oblation of thy meal-offering shalt thou season with salt; neither shalt thou suffer the salt of the covenant of thy God to be lacking from thy meal-offering: with all thine oblations thou shalt offer salt.
Leviticus2:14 And if thou offer a meal-offering of first-fruits unto Jehovah
Leviticus2:15 And thou shalt put oil upon it
Leviticus2:16 And the priest shall burn the memorial of it

Leviticus3:2 And he shall lay his hand upon the head of his oblation
Leviticus3:3 And he shall offer of the sacrifice of peace-offerings an offering made by fire unto Jehovah; the fat that covereth the inwards
Leviticus3:4 and the two kidneys
Leviticus3:5 And Aarons sons shall burn it on the altar upon the burnt-offering
Leviticus3:6 And if his oblation for a sacrifice of peace-offerings unto Jehovah be of the flock; male or female
Leviticus3:7 If he offer a lamb for his oblation
Leviticus3:8 and he shall lay his hand upon the head of his oblation
Leviticus3:9 And he shall offer of the sacrifice of peace-offerings an offering made by fire unto Jehovah; the fat thereof
Leviticus3:10 and the two kidneys
Leviticus3:11 And the priest shall burn it upon the altar: it is the food of the offering made by fire unto Jehovah.

Leviticus3:14 And he shall offer thereof his oblation
Leviticus3:15 and the two kidneys
Leviticus3:16 And the priest shall burn them upon the altar: it is the food of the offering made by fire

Leviticus4:3 if the anointed priest shall sin so as to bring guilt on the people

Leviticus4:5 And the anointed priest shall take of the blood of the bullock

Leviticus4:19 And all the fat thereof shall he take off from it

Leviticus5:2 Or if any one touch any unclean thing

Leviticus5:5 And it shall be

Leviticus5:11 But if his means suffice not for two turtle-doves

Leviticus5:19 It is a trespass-offering: he is certainly guilty before Jehovah.

Leviticus8:23 And he slew it; and Moses took of the blood thereof

Leviticus8:35 And at the door of the tent of meeting shall ye abide day and night seven days

Leviticus11:1 And Jehovah spake unto Moses and to Aaron
Leviticus11:2 Speak unto the children of Israel
Leviticus11:3 Whatsoever parteth the hoof
Leviticus11:4 Nevertheless these shall ye not eat of them that chew the cud
Leviticus11:5 And the coney
Leviticus11:6 And the hare
Leviticus11:7 And the swine
Leviticus11:8 Of their flesh ye shall not eat
Leviticus11:9 These may ye eat of all that are in the waters: whatsoever hath fins and scales in the waters
Leviticus11:10 And all that have not fins and scales in the seas
Leviticus11:11 and they shall be an abomination unto you; ye shall not eat of their flesh
Leviticus11:12 Whatsoever hath no fins nor scales in the waters
Leviticus11:13 And these ye shall have in abomination among the birds; they shall not be eaten
Leviticus11:14 and the kite
Leviticus11:15 every raven after its kind
Leviticus11:16 and the ostrich
Leviticus11:17 and the little owl
Leviticus11:18 and the horned owl
Leviticus11:19 and the stork
Leviticus11:20 All winged creeping things that go upon all fours are an abomination unto you.
Leviticus11:21 Yet these may ye eat of all winged creeping things that go upon all fours
Leviticus11:22 Even these of them ye may eat: the locust after its kind
Leviticus11:23 But all winged creeping things
Leviticus11:24 And by these ye shall become unclean: whosoever toucheth the carcass of them shall be unclean until the even;
Leviticus11:25 And whosoever beareth aught of the carcass of them shall wash his clothes
Leviticus11:26 Every beast which parteth the hoof
Leviticus11:27 And whatsoever goeth upon its paws
Leviticus11:28 And he that beareth the carcass of them shall wash his clothes
Leviticus11:29 And these are they which are unclean unto you among the creeping things that creep upon the earth: the weasel
Leviticus11:30 and the gecko
Leviticus11:31 These are they which are unclean to you among all that creep: whosoever doth touch them
Leviticus11:32 And upon whatsoever any of them
Leviticus11:33 And every earthen vessel
Leviticus11:34 All food therein which may be eaten
Leviticus11:35 And every thing whereupon any part of their carcass falleth shall be unclean; whether oven
Leviticus11:36 Nevertheless a fountain or a pit wherein is a gathering of water shall be clean: but that which toucheth their carcass shall be unclean.
Leviticus11:37 And if aught of their carcass fall upon any sowing seed which is to be sown
Leviticus11:38 But if water be put upon the seed
Leviticus11:39 And if any beast
Leviticus11:40 And he that eateth of the carcass of it shall wash his clothes
Leviticus11:41 And every creeping thing that creepeth upon the earth is an abomination; it shall not be eaten.
Leviticus11:42 Whatsoever goeth upon the belly
Leviticus11:43 Ye shall not make yourselves abominable with any creeping thing that creepeth
Leviticus11:44 For I am Jehovah your God: sanctify yourselves therefore
Leviticus11:45 For I am Jehovah that brought you up out of the land of Egypt
Leviticus11:46 This is the law of the beast
Leviticus11:47 to make a distinction between the unclean and the clean

Leviticus13:1 And Jehovah spake unto Moses and unto Aaron
Leviticus13:2 When a man shall have in the skin of his flesh a rising
Leviticus13:3 and the priest shall look on the plague in the skin of the flesh: and if the hair in the plague be turned white
Leviticus13:4 And if the bright spot be white in the skin of his flesh
Leviticus13:5 and the priest shall look on him the seventh day: and
Leviticus13:6 and the priest shall look on him again the seventh day; and
Leviticus13:7 But if the scab spread abroad in the skin
Leviticus13:8 and the priest shall look; and
Leviticus13:9 When the plague of leprosy is in a man
Leviticus13:10 and the priest shall look; and
Leviticus13:11 it is an old leprosy in the skin of his flesh
Leviticus13:12 And if the leprosy break out abroad in the skin
Leviticus13:13 then the priest shall look; and
Leviticus13:14 But whensoever raw flesh appeareth in him
Leviticus13:15 And the priest shall look on the raw flesh
Leviticus13:16 Or if the raw flesh turn again
Leviticus13:17 and the priest shall look on him; and
Leviticus13:18 And when the flesh hath in the skin thereof a boil
Leviticus13:19 and in the place of the boil there is a white rising
Leviticus13:20 and the priest shall look; and
Leviticus13:21 But if the priest look on it
Leviticus13:22 And if it spread abroad in the skin
Leviticus13:23 But if the bright spot stay in its place
Leviticus13:24 Or when the flesh hath in the skin thereof a burning by fire
Leviticus13:25 then the priest shall look upon it; and
Leviticus13:26 But if the priest look on it
Leviticus13:27 and the priest shall look upon him the seventh day: if it spread abroad in the skin
Leviticus13:28 And if the bright spot stay in its place
Leviticus13:29 And when a man or woman hath a plague upon the head or upon the beard
Leviticus13:30 then the priest shall look on the plague; and
Leviticus13:31 And if the priest look on the plague of the scall
Leviticus13:32 And in the seventh day the priest shall look on the plague; and
Leviticus13:33 then he shall be shaven
Leviticus13:34 and in the seventh day the priest shall look on the scall; and
Leviticus13:35 But if the scall spread abroad in the skin after his cleansing
Leviticus13:36 then the priest shall look on him; and
Leviticus13:37 But if in his eyes the scall be at a stay
Leviticus13:38 And when a man or a woman hath in the skin of the flesh bright spots
Leviticus13:39 then the priest shall look; and
Leviticus13:40 And if a mans hair be fallen off his head
Leviticus13:41 And if his hair be fallen off from the front part of his head
Leviticus13:42 But if there be in the bald head
Leviticus13:43 Then the priest shall look upon him; and
Leviticus13:44 he is a leprous man
Leviticus13:45 And the leper in whom the plague is
Leviticus13:46 All the days wherein the plague is in him he shall be unclean; he is unclean: he shall dwell alone; without the camp shall his dwelling be.
Leviticus13:47 The garment also that the plague of leprosy is in
Leviticus13:48 whether it be in warp
Leviticus13:49 if the plague be greenish or reddish in the garment
Leviticus13:50 And the priest shall look upon the plague
Leviticus13:51 and he shall look on the plague on the seventh day: if the plague be spread in the garment
Leviticus13:52 And he shall burn the garment
Leviticus13:53 And if the priest shall look
Leviticus13:54 then the priest shall command that they wash the thing wherein the plague is
Leviticus13:55 and the priest shall look
Leviticus13:56 And if the priest look
Leviticus13:57 and if it appear still in the garment
Leviticus13:58 And the garment
Leviticus13:59 This is the law of the plague of leprosy in a garment of woollen or linen

Leviticus14:2 This shall be the law of the leper in the day of his cleansing: he shall be brought unto the priest:
Leviticus14:3 and the priest shall go forth out of the camp; and the priest shall look; and
Leviticus14:4 then shall the priest command to take for him that is to be cleansed two living clean birds
Leviticus14:5 And the priest shall command to kill one of the birds in an earthen vessel over running water.
Leviticus14:6 As for the living bird
Leviticus14:7 And he shall sprinkle upon him that is to be cleansed from the leprosy seven times
Leviticus14:8 And he that is to be cleansed shall wash his clothes
Leviticus14:9 And it shall be on the seventh day
Leviticus14:10 And on the eighth day he shall take two he-lambs without blemish
Leviticus14:11 And the priest that cleanseth him shall set the man that is to be cleansed
Leviticus14:12 And the priest shall take one of the he-lambs
Leviticus14:13 and he shall kill the he-lamb in the place where they kill the sin-offering and the burnt-offering
Leviticus14:14 and the priest shall take of the blood of the trespass-offering
Leviticus14:15 And the priest shall take of the log of oil
Leviticus14:16 and the priest shall dip his right finger in the oil that is in his left hand
Leviticus14:17 and of the rest of the oil that is in his hand shall the priest put upon the tip of the right ear of him that is to be cleansed
Leviticus14:18 and the rest of the oil that is in the priests hand he shall put upon the head of him that is to be cleansed: and the priest shall make atonement for him before Jehovah.
Leviticus14:19 And the priest shall offer the sin-offering
Leviticus14:20 and the priest shall offer the burnt-offering and the meal-offering upon the altar: and the priest shall make atonement for him
Leviticus14:21 And if he be poor

Leviticus14:24 and the priest shall take the lamb of the trespass-offering
Leviticus14:25 And he shall kill the lamb of the trespass-offering; and the priest shall take of the blood of the trespass-offering
Leviticus14:26 And the priest shall pour of the oil into the palm of his own left hand;
Leviticus14:27 and the priest shall sprinkle with his right finger some of the oil that is in his left hand seven times before Jehovah:
Leviticus14:28 and the priest shall put of the oil that is in his hand upon the tip of the right ear of him that is to be cleansed
Leviticus14:29 and the rest of the oil that is in the priests hand he shall put upon the head of him that is to be cleansed
Leviticus14:30 And he shall offer one of the turtle-doves
Leviticus14:31 even such as he is able to get
Leviticus14:32 This is the law of him in whom is the plague of leprosy
Leviticus14:33 And Jehovah spake unto Moses and unto Aaron
Leviticus14:34 When ye are come into the land of Canaan
Leviticus14:35 then he that owneth the house shall come and tell the priest
Leviticus14:36 And the priest shall command that they empty the house
Leviticus14:37 and he shall look on the plague; and
Leviticus14:38 then the priest shall go out of the house to the door of the house
Leviticus14:39 And the priest shall come again the seventh day
Leviticus14:40 then the priest shall command that they take out the stones in which the plague is
Leviticus14:41 and he shall cause the house to be scraped within round about
Leviticus14:42 and they shall take other stones
Leviticus14:43 And if the plague come again
Leviticus14:44 then the priest shall come in and look; and
Leviticus14:45 And he shall break down the house
Leviticus14:46 Moreover he that goeth into the house all the while that it is shut up shall be unclean until the even.
Leviticus14:47 And he that lieth in the house shall wash his clothes; and he that eateth in the house shall wash his clothes.
Leviticus14:48 And if the priest shall come in
Leviticus14:49 And he shall take to cleanse the house two birds
Leviticus14:50 and he shall kill one of the birds in an earthen vessel over running water:
Leviticus14:51 and he shall take the cedar wood
Leviticus14:52 and he shall cleanse the house with the blood of the bird
Leviticus14:53 but he shall let got the living bird out of the city into the open field: so shall he make atonement for the house; and it shall be clean.
Leviticus14:54 This is the law for all manner of plague of leprosy
Leviticus14:55 and for the leprosy of a garment
Leviticus14:56 and for a rising
Leviticus14:57 to teach when it is unclean
Leviticus15:1 And Jehovah spake unto Moses and to Aaron
Leviticus15:2 Speak unto the children of Israel
Leviticus15:3 And this shall be his uncleanness in his issue: whether his flesh run with his issue
Leviticus15:4 Every bed whereon he that hath the issue lieth shall be unclean; and everything whereon he sitteth shall be unclean.
Leviticus15:5 And whosoever toucheth his bed shall wash his clothes
Leviticus15:6 And he that sitteth on anything whereon he that hath the issue sat shall wash his clothes
Leviticus15:7 And he that toucheth the flesh of him that hath the issue shall wash his clothes
Leviticus15:8 And if he that hath the issue spit upon him that is clean
Leviticus15:9 And what saddle soever he that hath the issue rideth upon shall be unclean.
Leviticus15:10 And whosoever toucheth anything that was under him shall be unclean until the even: and he that beareth those things shall wash his clothes
Leviticus15:11 And whomsoever he that hath the issue toucheth
Leviticus15:12 And the earthen vessel
Leviticus15:13 And when he that hath an issue is cleansed of his issue
Leviticus15:14 And on the eighth day he shall take to him two turtle-doves
Leviticus15:15 and the priest shall offer them
Leviticus15:16 And if any mans seed of copulation go out from him
Leviticus15:17 And every garment
Leviticus15:18 The woman also with whom a man shall lie with seed of copulation
Leviticus15:19 And if a woman have an issue
Leviticus15:20 And everything that she lieth upon in her impurity shall be unclean: everything also that she sitteth upon shall be unclean.
Leviticus15:21 And whosoever toucheth her bed shall wash his clothes
Leviticus15:22 And whosoever toucheth anything that she sitteth upon shall wash his clothes
Leviticus15:23 And if it be on the bed
Leviticus15:24 And if any man lie with her
Leviticus15:25 And if a woman have an issue of her blood many days not in the time of her impurity
Leviticus15:26 Every bed whereon she lieth all the days of her issue shall be unto her as the bed of her impurity: and everything whereon she sitteth shall be unclean
Leviticus15:27 And whosoever toucheth those things shall be unclean
Leviticus15:28 But if she be cleansed of her issue
Leviticus15:29 And on the eighth day she shall take unto her two turtle-doves
Leviticus15:30 And the priest shall offer the one for a sin-offering
Leviticus15:31 Thus shall ye separate the children of Israel from their uncleanness
Leviticus15:32 This is the law of him that hath an issue
Leviticus15:33 and of her that is sick with her impurity

Leviticus16:16 and he shall make atonement for the holy place
Leviticus16:17 And there shall be no man in the tent of meeting when he goeth in to make atonement in the holy place
Leviticus16:18 And he shall go out unto the altar that is before Jehovah
Leviticus16:19 And he shall sprinkle of the blood upon it with his finger seven times
Leviticus16:20 And when he hath made an end of atoning for the holy place
Leviticus16:21 and Aaron shall lay both his hands upon the head of the live goat

Leviticus16:23 And Aaron shall come into the tent of meeting
Leviticus16:24 and he shall bathe his flesh in water in a holy place
Leviticus16:25 And the fat of the sin-offering shall he burn upon the altar.
Leviticus16:26 And he that letteth go the goat for Azazel shall wash his clothes
Leviticus16:27 And the bullock of the sin-offering
Leviticus16:28 And he that burneth them shall wash his clothes
Leviticus16:29 And it shall be a statute for ever unto you: in the seventh month

Leviticus16:31 It is a sabbath of solemn rest unto you

Leviticus16:34 And this shall be an everlasting statute unto you

Leviticus18:1 And Jehovah spake unto Moses
Leviticus18:2 Speak unto the children of Israel
Leviticus18:3 After the doings of the land of Egypt
Leviticus18:4 Mine ordinances shall ye do
Leviticus18:5 Ye shall therefore keep my statutes
Leviticus18:6 None of you shall approach to any that are near of kin to him
Leviticus18:7 The nakedness of thy father
Leviticus18:8 The nakedness of thy fathers wife shalt thou not uncover: it is thy fathers nakedness.
Leviticus18:9 The nakedness of thy sister
Leviticus18:10 The nakedness of thy sons daughter
Leviticus18:11 The nakedness of thy fathers wifes daughter
Leviticus18:12 Thou shalt not uncover the nakedness of thy fathers sister: she is thy fathers near kinswoman.
Leviticus18:13 Thou shalt not uncover the nakedness of thy mothers sister: for she is thy mothers near kinswoman.
Leviticus18:14 Thou shalt not uncover the nakedness of thy fathers brother
Leviticus18:15 Thou shalt not uncover the nakedness of thy daughter-in-law: she is thy sons wife; thou shalt not uncover her nakedness.
Leviticus18:16 Thou shalt not uncover the nakedness of thy brothers wife: it is thy brothers nakedness.
Leviticus18:17 Thou shalt not uncover the nakedness of a woman and her daughter; thou shalt not take her sons daughter
Leviticus18:18 And thou shalt not take a wife to her sister
Leviticus18:19 And thou shalt not approach unto a woman to uncover her nakedness
Leviticus18:20 And thou shalt not lie carnally with thy neighbors wife
Leviticus18:21 And thou shalt not give any of thy seed to make them pass through the fire to Molech; neither shalt thou profane the name of thy God: I am Jehovah.
Leviticus18:22 Thou shalt not lie with mankind
Leviticus18:23 And thou shalt not lie with any beast to defile thyself therewith; neither shall any woman stand before a beast
Leviticus18:24 Defile not ye yourselves in any of these things: for in all these the nations are defiled which I cast out from before you;
Leviticus18:25 And the land is defiled: therefore I do visit the iniquity thereof upon it
Leviticus18:26 Ye therefore shall keep my statutes and mine ordinances
Leviticus18:27 (for all these abominations have the men of the land done
Leviticus18:28 that the land vomit not you out also
Leviticus18:29 For whosoever shall do any of these abominations
Leviticus18:30 Therefore shall ye keep my charge

Leviticus19:2 Speak unto all the congregation of the children of Israel
Leviticus19:3 Ye shall fear every man his mother
Leviticus19:4 Turn ye not unto idols
Leviticus19:5 And when ye offer a sacrifice of peace-offerings unto Jehovah
Leviticus19:6 It shall be eaten the same day ye offer it
Leviticus19:7 And if it be eaten at all on the third day
Leviticus19:8 but every one that eateth it shall bear his iniquity
Leviticus19:9 And when ye reap the harvest of your land
Leviticus19:10 And thou shalt not glean thy vineyard
Leviticus19:11 Ye shall not steal; neither shall ye deal falsely
Leviticus19:12 And ye shall not swear by my name falsely
Leviticus19:13 Thou shalt not oppress thy neighbor
Leviticus19:14 Thou shalt not curse the deaf
Leviticus19:15 Ye shall do no unrighteousness in judgment: thou shalt not respect the person of the poor
Leviticus19:16 Thou shalt not go up and down as a talebearer among thy people: neither shalt thou stand against the blood of thy neighbor: I am Jehovah.
Leviticus19:17 Thou shalt not hate thy brother in thy heart: thou shalt surely rebuke thy neighbor
Leviticus19:18 Thou shalt not take vengeance
Leviticus19:19 Ye shall keep my statutes. Thou shalt not let thy cattle gender with a diverse kind: thou shalt not sow thy field with two kinds of seed: neither shall there come upon thee a garment of two kinds of stuff mingled together.
Leviticus19:20 And whosoever lieth carnally with a woman
Leviticus19:21 And he shall bring his trespass-offering unto Jehovah
Leviticus19:22 And the priest shall make atonement for him with the ram of the trespass-offering before Jehovah for his sin which he hath sinned: and the sin which he hath sinned shall be forgiven him.
Leviticus19:23 And when ye shall come into the land
Leviticus19:24 But in the fourth year all the fruit thereof shall be holy
Leviticus19:25 And in the fifth year shall ye eat of the fruit thereof
Leviticus19:26 Ye shall not eat anything with the blood: neither shall ye use enchantments
Leviticus19:27 Ye shall not round the corners of your heads
Leviticus19:28 Ye shall not make any cuttings in your flesh for the dead
Leviticus19:29 Profane not thy daughter
Leviticus19:30 Ye shall keep my sabbaths
Leviticus19:31 Turn ye not unto them that have familiar spirits
Leviticus19:32 Thou shalt rise up before the hoary head
Leviticus19:33 And if a stranger sojourn with thee in your land
Leviticus19:34 The stranger that sojourneth with you shall be unto you as the home-born among you
Leviticus19:35 Ye shall do no unrighteousness in judgment
Leviticus19:36 Just balances
Leviticus19:37 And ye shall observe all my statutes

Leviticus25:1 And Jehovah spake unto Moses in mount Sinai
Leviticus25:2 Speak unto the children of Israel
Leviticus25:3 Six years thou shalt sow thy field
Leviticus25:4 but in the seventh year shall be a sabbath of solemn rest for the land
Leviticus25:5 That which groweth of itself of thy harvest thou shalt not reap
Leviticus25:6 And the sabbath of the land shall be for food for you; for thee
Leviticus25:7 And for thy cattle
Leviticus25:8 And thou shalt number seven sabbaths of years unto thee
Leviticus25:9 Then shalt thou send abroad the loud trumpet on the tenth day of the seventh month; in the day of atonement shall ye send abroad the trumpet throughout all your land.
Leviticus25:10 And ye shall hallow the fiftieth year
Leviticus25:11 A jubilee shall that fiftieth year be unto you: ye shall not sow
Leviticus25:12 For it is a jubilee; it shall be holy unto you: ye shall eat the increase thereof out of the field.
Leviticus25:13 In this year of jubilee ye shall return every man unto his possession.
Leviticus25:14 And if thou sell aught unto thy neighbor
Leviticus25:15 According to the number of years after the jubilee thou shalt buy of thy neighbor
Leviticus25:16 According to the multitude of the years thou shalt increase the price thereof
Leviticus25:17 And ye shall not wrong one another; but thou shalt fear thy God: for I am Jehovah your God.
Leviticus25:18 Wherefore ye shall do my statutes
Leviticus25:19 And the land shall yield its fruit
Leviticus25:20 And if ye shall say
Leviticus25:21 then I will command my blessing upon you in the sixth year
Leviticus25:22 And ye shall sow the eighth year
Leviticus25:23 And the land shall not be sold in perpetuity; for the land is mine: for ye are strangers and sojourners with me.
Leviticus25:24 And in all the land of your possession ye shall grant a redemption for the land.
Leviticus25:25 If thy brother be waxed poor
Leviticus25:26 And if a man have no one to redeem it
Leviticus25:27 then let him reckon the years of the sale thereof
Leviticus25:28 But if he be not able to get it back for himself
Leviticus25:29 And if a man sell a dwelling-house in a walled city
Leviticus25:30 And if it be not redeemed within the space of a full year
Leviticus25:31 But the houses of the villages which have no wall round about them shall be reckoned with the fields of the country: they may be redeemed
Leviticus25:32 Nevertheless the cities of the Levites
Leviticus25:33 And if one of the Levites redeem
Leviticus25:34 But the field of the suburbs of their cities may not be sold; for it is their perpetual possession.
Leviticus25:35 And if thy brother be waxed poor
Leviticus25:36 Take thou no interest of him or increase
Leviticus25:37 Thou shalt not give him thy money upon interest
Leviticus25:38 I am Jehovah your God
Leviticus25:39 And if thy brother be waxed poor with thee
Leviticus25:40 As a hired servant
Leviticus25:41 then shall he go out from thee
Leviticus25:42 For they are my servants
Leviticus25:43 Thou shalt not rule over him with rigor
Leviticus25:44 And as for thy bondmen
Leviticus25:45 Moreover of the children of the strangers that sojourn among you
Leviticus25:46 And ye shall make them an inheritance for your children after you
Leviticus25:47 And if a stranger or sojourner with thee be waxed rich
Leviticus25:48 after that he is sold he may be redeemed: one of his brethren may redeem him;
Leviticus25:49 or his uncle
Leviticus25:50 And he shall reckon with him that bought him from the year that he sold himself to him unto the year of jubilee: and the price of his sale shall be according unto the number of years; according to the time of a hired servant shall he be with him.
Leviticus25:51 If there be yet many years
Leviticus25:52 And if there remain but few years unto the year of jubilee
Leviticus25:53 As a servant hired year by year shall he be with him: he shall not rule with rigor over him in thy sight.
Leviticus25:54 And if he be not redeemed by these means
Leviticus25:55 For unto me the children of Israel are servants; they are my servants whom I brought forth out of the land of Egypt: I am Jehovah your God.
Leviticus26:1 Ye shall make you no idols
Leviticus26:2 Ye shall keep my sabbaths
Leviticus26:3 If ye walk in my statutes
Leviticus26:4 then I will give your rains in their season
Leviticus26:5 And your threshing shall reach unto the vintage
Leviticus26:6 And I will give peace in the land
Leviticus26:7 And ye shall chase your enemies
Leviticus26:8 And five of you shall chase a hundred
Leviticus26:9 And I will have respect unto you
Leviticus26:10 And ye shall eat old store long kept
Leviticus26:11 And I will set my tabernacle among you: and my soul shall not abhor you.
Leviticus26:12 And I will walk among you
Leviticus26:13 I am Jehovah your God
Leviticus26:14 But if ye will not hearken unto me
Leviticus26:15 and if ye shall reject my statutes
Leviticus26:16 I also will do this unto you: I will appoint terror over you
Leviticus26:17 And I will set my face against you
Leviticus26:18 And if ye will not yet for these things hearken unto me
Leviticus26:19 And I will break the pride of your power: and I will make your heaven as iron
Leviticus26:20 and your strength shall be spent in vain; for your land shall not yield its increase
Leviticus26:21 And if ye walk contrary unto me
Leviticus26:22 And I will send the beast of the field among you
Leviticus26:23 And if by these things ye will not be reformed unto me
Leviticus26:24 then will I also walk contrary unto you; and I will smite you
Leviticus26:25 And I will bring a sword upon you
Leviticus26:26 When I break your staff of bread
Leviticus26:27 And if ye will not for all this hearken unto me
Leviticus26:28 then I will walk contrary unto you in wrath; and I also will chastise you seven times for your sins.
Leviticus26:29 And ye shall eat the flesh of your sons
Leviticus26:30 And I will destroy your high places
Leviticus26:31 And I will make your cities a waste
Leviticus26:32 And I will bring the land into desolation; and your enemies that dwell therein shall be astonished at it.
Leviticus26:33 And you will I scatter among the nations
Leviticus26:34 Then shall the land enjoy its sabbaths
Leviticus26:35 As long as it lieth desolate it shall have rest
Leviticus26:36 And as for them that are left of you
Leviticus26:37 And they shall stumble one upon another
Leviticus26:38 And ye shall perish among the nations
Leviticus26:39 And they that are left of you shall pine away in their iniquity in your enemies lands; and also in the iniquities of their fathers shall they pine away with them.
Leviticus26:40 And they shall confess their iniquity
Leviticus26:41 I also walked contrary unto them
Leviticus26:42 then will I remember my covenant with Jacob; and also my covenant with Isaac
Leviticus26:43 The land also shall be left by them
Leviticus26:44 And yet for all that
Leviticus26:45 but I will for their sakes remember the covenant of their ancestors
Leviticus26:46 These are the statutes and ordinances and laws
Leviticus27:1 And Jehovah spake unto Moses
Leviticus27:2 Speak unto the children of Israel
Leviticus27:3 And thy estimation shall be of the male from twenty years old even unto sixty years old
Leviticus27:4 And if it be a female
Leviticus27:5 And if it be from five years old even unto twenty years old
Leviticus27:6 And if it be from a month old even unto five years old
Leviticus27:7 And if it be from sixty years old and upward; if it be a male
Leviticus27:8 But if he be poorer than thy estimation
Leviticus27:9 And if it be a beast
Leviticus27:10 He shall not alter it
Leviticus27:11 And if it be any unclean beast
Leviticus27:12 and the priest shall value it
Leviticus27:13 But if he will indeed redeem it
Leviticus27:14 And when a man shall sanctify his house to be holy unto Jehovah
Leviticus27:15 And if he that sanctified it will redeem his house
Leviticus27:16 And if a man shall sanctify unto Jehovah part of the field of his possession
Leviticus27:17 If he sanctify his field from the year of jubilee
Leviticus27:18 But if he sanctify his field after the jubilee
Leviticus27:19 And if he that sanctified the field will indeed redeem it
Leviticus27:20 And if he will not redeem the field
Leviticus27:21 but the field
Leviticus27:22 And if he sanctify unto Jehovah a field which he hath bought
Leviticus27:23 then the priest shall reckon unto him the worth of thy estimation unto the year of jubilee: and he shall give thine estimation in that day
Leviticus27:24 In the year of jubilee the field shall return unto him of whom it was bought
Leviticus27:25 And all thy estimations shall be according to the shekel of the sanctuary: twenty gerahs shall be the shekel.
Leviticus27:26 Only the firstling among beasts
Leviticus27:27 And if it be of an unclean beast
Leviticus27:28 Notwithstanding
Leviticus27:29 No one devoted
Leviticus27:30 And all the tithe of the land
Leviticus27:31 And if a man will redeem aught of his tithe
Leviticus27:32 And all the tithe of the herd or the flock
Leviticus27:33 He shall not search whether it be good or bad
Leviticus27:34 These are the commandments
Numbers1:1 And Jehovah spake unto Moses in the wilderness of Sinai
Numbers1:2 Take ye the sum of all the congregation of the children of Israel
Numbers1:3 from twenty years old and upward
Numbers1:4 And with you there shall be a man of every tribe; every one head of his fathers house.
Numbers1:5 And these are the names of the men that shall stand with you. Of Reuben: Elizur the son of Shedeur.
Numbers1:6 Of Simeon: Shelumiel the son of Zurishaddai.
Numbers1:7 Of Judah: Nahshon the son of Amminadab.
Numbers1:8 Of Issachar: Nethanel the son of Zuar.
Numbers1:9 Of Zebulun: Eliab the son of Helon.
Numbers1:10 Of the children of Joseph: Of Ephraim: Elishama the son of Ammihud. Of Manasseh: Gamaliel the son of Pedahzur.
Numbers1:11 Of Benjamin: Abidan the son of Gideoni.
Numbers1:12 Of Dan: Ahiezer the son of Ammishaddai.
Numbers1:13 Of Asher: Pagiel the son of Ochran.
Numbers1:14 Of Gad: Eliasaph the son of Deuel.
Numbers1:15 Of Naphtali: Ahira the son of Enan.
Numbers1:16 These are they that were called of the congregation
Numbers1:17 And Moses and Aaron took these men that are mentioned by name:
Numbers1:18 And they assembled all the congregation together on the first day of the second month; and they declared their pedigrees after their families
Numbers1:19 As Jehovah commanded Moses
Numbers1:20 And the children of Reuben
Numbers1:21 those that were numbered of them
Numbers1:22 Of the children of Simeon
Numbers1:23 those that were numbered of them
Numbers1:24 Of the children of Gad
Numbers1:25 those that were numbered of them
Numbers1:26 Of the children of Judah
Numbers1:27 those that were numbered of them
Numbers1:28 Of the children of Issachar
Numbers1:29 those that were numbered of them
Numbers1:30 Of the children of Zebulun
Numbers1:31 those that were numbered of them
Numbers1:32 Of the children of Joseph
Numbers1:33 those that were numbered of them
Numbers1:34 Of the children of Manasseh
Numbers1:35 those that were numbered of them
Numbers1:36 Of the children of Benjamin
Numbers1:37 those that were numbered of them
Numbers1:38 Of the children of Dan
Numbers1:39 those that were numbered of them
Numbers1:40 Of the children of Asher
Numbers1:41 those that were numbered of them
Numbers1:42 Of the children of Naphtali
Numbers1:43 those that were numbered of them
Numbers1:44 These are they that were numbered
Numbers1:45 So all they that were numbered of the children of Israel by their fathers houses
Numbers1:46 even all they that were numbered were six hundred thousand and three thousand and five hundred and fifty.
Numbers1:47 But the Levites after the tribe of their fathers were not numbered among them.
Numbers1:48 For Jehovah spake unto Moses
Numbers1:49 Only the tribe of Levi thou shalt not number
Numbers1:50 but appoint thou the Levites over the tabernacle of the testimony
Numbers1:51 And when the tabernacle setteth forward
Numbers1:52 And the children of Israel shall pitch their tents
Numbers1:53 But the Levites shall encamp round about the tabernacle of the testimony
Numbers1:54 Thus did the children of Israel; according to all that Jehovah commanded Moses
Numbers2:1 And Jehovah spake unto Moses and unto Aaron
Numbers2:2 The children of Israel shall encamp every man by his own standard
Numbers2:3 And those that encamp on the east side toward the sunrising shall be they of the standard of the camp of Judah
Numbers2:4 And his host
Numbers2:5 And those that encamp next unto him shall be the tribe of Issachar: and the prince of the children of Issachar shall be Nethanel the son of Zuar.
Numbers2:6 And his host
Numbers2:7 And the tribe of Zebulun: and the prince of the children of Zebulun shall be Eliab the son of Helon.
Numbers2:8 And his host
Numbers2:9 All that were numbered of the camp of Judah were a hundred thousand and fourscore thousand and six thousand and four hundred
Numbers2:10 On the south side shall be the standard of the camp of Reuben according to their hosts: and the prince of the children of Reuben shall be Elizur the son of Shedeur.
Numbers2:11 And his host
Numbers2:12 And those that encamp next unto him shall be the tribe of Simeon: and the prince of the children of Simeon shall be Shelumiel the son of Zurishaddai.
Numbers2:13 And his host
Numbers2:14 And the tribe of Gad: and the prince of the children of Gad shall be Eliasaph the son of Reuel.
Numbers2:15 And his host
Numbers2:16 All that were numbered of the camp of Reuben were a hundred thousand and fifty and one thousand and four hundred and fifty
Numbers2:17 Then the tent of meeting shall set forward
Numbers2:18 On the west side shall be the standard of the camp of Ephraim according to their hosts: and the prince of the children of Ephraim shall be Elishama the son of Ammihud.
Numbers2:19 And his host
Numbers2:20 And next unto him shall be the tribe of Manasseh: and the prince of the children of Manasseh shall be Gamaliel the son of Pedahzur.
Numbers2:21 And his host
Numbers2:22 And the tribe of Benjamin: and the prince of the children of Benjamin shall be Abidan the son of Gideoni.
Numbers2:23 And his host
Numbers2:24 All that were numbered of the camp of Ephraim were a hundred thousand and eight thousand and a hundred
Numbers2:25 On the north side shall be the standard of the camp of Dan according to their hosts: and the prince of the children of Dan shall be Ahiezer the son of Ammishaddai.
Numbers2:26 And his host
Numbers2:27 And those that encamp next unto him shall be the tribe of Asher: and the prince of the children of Asher shall be Pagiel the son of Ochran.
Numbers2:28 And his host
Numbers2:29 And the tribe of Naphtali: and the prince of the children of Naphtali shall be Ahira the son of Enan.
Numbers2:30 And his host
Numbers2:31 All that were numbered of the camp of Dan were a hundred thousand and fifty and seven thousand and six hundred. They shall set forth hindmost by their standards.
Numbers2:32 These are they that were numbered of the children of Israel by their fathers houses: all that were numbered of the camps according to their hosts were six hundred thousand and three thousand and five hundred and fifty.
Numbers2:33 But the Levites were not numbered among the children of Israel; as Jehovah commanded Moses.
Numbers2:34 Thus did the children of Israel; according to all that Jehovah commanded Moses
Numbers3:1 Now these are the generations of Aaron and Moses in the day that Jehovah spake with Moses in mount Sinai.
Numbers3:2 And these are the names of the sons of Aaron: Nadab the first-born
Numbers3:3 These are the names of the sons of Aaron
Numbers3:4 And Nadab and Abihu died before Jehovah
Numbers3:5 And Jehovah spake unto Moses
Numbers3:6 Bring the tribe of Levi near
Numbers3:7 And they shall keep his charge
Numbers3:8 And they shall keep all the furniture of the tent of meeting
Numbers3:9 And thou shalt give the Levites unto Aaron and to his sons: they are wholly given unto him on the behalf of the children of Israel.
Numbers3:10 And thou shalt appoint Aaron and his sons
Numbers3:11 And Jehovah spake unto Moses
Numbers3:12 And I
Numbers3:13 for all the first-born are mine; on the day that I smote all the first-born in the land of Egypt I hallowed unto me all the first-born in Israel
Numbers3:14 And Jehovah spake unto Moses in the wilderness of Sinai
Numbers3:15 Number the children of Levi by their fathers houses
Numbers3:16 And Moses numbered them according to the word of Jehovah
Numbers3:17 And these were the sons of Levi by their names: Gershon
Numbers3:18 And these are the names of the sons of Gershon by their families: Libni and Shimei.
Numbers3:19 And the sons of Kohath by their families: Amram
Numbers3:20 And the sons of Merari by their families: Mahli and Mushi. These are the families of the Levites according to their fathers houses.
Numbers3:21 Of Gershon was the family of the Libnites
Numbers3:22 Those that were numbered of them
Numbers3:23 The families of the Gershonites shall encamp behind the tabernacle westward.
Numbers3:24 And the prince of the fathers house of the Gershonites shall be Eliasaph the son of Lael.
Numbers3:25 And the charge of the sons of Gershon in the tent of meeting shall be the tabernacle
Numbers3:26 and the hangings of the court
Numbers3:27 And of Kohath was the family of the Amramites
Numbers3:28 According to the number of all the males
Numbers3:29 The families of the sons of Kohath shall encamp on the side of the tabernacle southward.
Numbers3:30 And the prince of the fathers house of the families of the Kohathites shall be Elizaphan the son of Uzziel.
Numbers3:31 And their charge shall be the ark
Numbers3:32 And Eleazar the son of Aaron the priest shall be prince of the princes of the Levites
Numbers3:33 Of Merari was the family of the Mahlites
Numbers3:34 And those that were numbered of them
Numbers3:35 And the prince of the fathers house of the families of Merari was Zuriel the son of Abihail: they shall encamp on the side of the tabernacle northward.
Numbers3:36 And the appointed charge of the sons of Merari shall be the boards of the tabernacle
Numbers3:37 and the pillars of the court round about
Numbers3:38 And those that encamp before the tabernacle eastward
Numbers3:39 All that were numbered of the Levites
Numbers3:40 And Jehovah said unto Moses
Numbers3:41 And thou shalt take the Levites for me (I am Jehovah) instead of all the first-born among the children of Israel; and the cattle of the Levites instead of all the firstlings among the cattle of the children of Israel:
Numbers3:42 and Moses numbered
Numbers3:43 And all the first-born males according to the number of names
Numbers3:44 And Jehovah spake unto Moses
Numbers3:45 Take the Levites instead of all the first-born among the children of Israel
Numbers3:46 And for the redemption of the two hundred and threescore and thirteen of the first-born of the children of Israel
Numbers3:47 thou shalt take five shekels apiece by the poll; after the shekel of the sanctuary shalt thou take them (the shekel is twenty gerahs):
Numbers3:48 and thou shalt give the money
Numbers3:49 And Moses took the redemption-money from them that were over and above them that were redeemed by the Levites;
Numbers3:50 from the first-born of the children of Israel took he the money
Numbers3:51 and Moses gave the redemption-money unto Aaron and to his sons
Numbers4:1 And Jehovah spake unto Moses and unto Aaron
Numbers4:2 Take the sum of the sons of Kohath from among the sons of Levi
Numbers4:3 from thirty years old and upward even until fifty years old
Numbers4:4 This is the service of the sons of Kohath in the tent of meeting
Numbers4:5 when the camp setteth forward
Numbers4:6 and shall put thereon a covering of sealskin
Numbers4:7 And upon the table of showbread they shall spread a cloth of blue
Numbers4:8 and they shall spread upon them a cloth of scarlet
Numbers4:9 And they shall take a cloth of blue
Numbers4:10 and they shall put it and all the vessels thereof within a covering of sealskin
Numbers4:11 And upon the golden altar they shall spread a cloth of blue
Numbers4:12 and they shall take all the vessels of ministry
Numbers4:13 And they shall take away the ashes from the altar
Numbers4:14 and they shall put upon it all the vessels thereof
Numbers4:15 And when Aaron and his sons have made an end of covering the sanctuary
Numbers4:16 And the charge of Eleazar the son of Aaron the priest shall be the oil for the light
Numbers4:17 And Jehovah spake unto Moses and unto Aaron
Numbers4:18 Cut ye not off the tribe of the families of the Kohathites from among the Levites;
Numbers4:19 but thus do unto them
Numbers4:20 but they shall not go in to see the sanctuary even for a moment
Numbers4:21 And Jehovah spake unto Moses
Numbers4:22 Take the sum of the sons of Gershon also
Numbers4:23 from thirty years old and upward until fifty years old shalt thou number them; all that enter in to wait upon the service
Numbers4:24 This is the service of the families of the Gershonites
Numbers4:25 they shall bear the curtains of the tabernacle
Numbers4:26 and the hangings of the court
Numbers4:27 At the commandment of Aaron and his sons shall be all the service of the sons of the Gershonites
Numbers4:28 This is the service of the families of the sons of the Gershonites in the tent of meeting: and their charge shall be under the hand of Ithamar the son of Aaron the priest.
Numbers4:29 As for the sons of Merari
Numbers4:30 from thirty years old and upward even unto fifty years old shalt thou number them
Numbers4:31 And this is the charge of their burden
Numbers4:32 and the pillars of the court round about
Numbers4:33 This is the service of the families of the sons of Merari
Numbers4:34 And Moses and Aaron and the princes of the congregation numbered the sons of the Kohathites by their families
Numbers4:35 from thirty years old and upward even unto fifty years old
Numbers4:36 and those that were numbered of them by their families were two thousand seven hundred and fifty.
Numbers4:37 These are they that were numbered of the families of the Kohathites
Numbers4:38 And those that were numbered of the sons of Gershon
Numbers4:39 from thirty years old and upward even unto fifty years old
Numbers4:40 even those that were numbered of them
Numbers4:41 These are they that were numbered of the families of the sons of Gershon
Numbers4:42 And those that were numbered of the families of the sons of Merari
Numbers4:43 from thirty years old and upward even unto fifty years old
Numbers4:44 even those that were numbered of them by their families
Numbers4:45 These are they that were numbered of the families of the sons of Merari
Numbers4:46 All those that were numbered of the Levites
Numbers4:47 from thirty years old and upward even unto fifty years old
Numbers4:48 even those that were numbered of them
Numbers4:49 According to the commandment of Jehovah they were numbered by Moses
Numbers5:1 And Jehovah spake unto Moses
Numbers5:2 Command the children of Israel
Numbers5:3 both male and female shall ye put out
Numbers5:4 And the children of Israel did so
Numbers5:5 And Jehovah spake unto Moses
Numbers5:6 Speak unto the children of Israel
Numbers5:7 then he shall confess his sin which he hath done: and he shall make restitution for his guilt in full
Numbers5:8 But if the man have no kinsman to whom restitution may be made for the guilt
Numbers5:9 And every heave-offering of all the holy things of the children of Israel
Numbers5:10 And every mans hallowed things shall be his: whatsoever any man giveth the priest
Numbers5:11 And Jehovah spake unto Moses
Numbers5:12 Speak unto the children of Israel
Numbers5:13 and a man lie with her carnally
Numbers5:14 and the spirit of jealousy come upon him
Numbers5:15 then shall the man bring his wife unto the priest
Numbers5:16 And the priest shall bring her near
Numbers5:17 and the priest shall take holy water in an earthen vessel; and of the dust that is on the floor of the tabernacle the priest shall take
Numbers5:18 And the priest shall set the woman before Jehovah
Numbers5:19 And the priest shall cause her to swear
Numbers5:20 But if thou have gone aside
Numbers5:21 then the priest shall cause the woman to swear with the oath of cursing
Numbers5:22 and this water that causeth the curse shall go into thy bowels
Numbers5:23 And the priest shall write these curses in a book
Numbers5:24 and he shall make the woman drink the water of bitterness that causeth the curse; and the water that causeth the curse shall enter into her and become bitter.
Numbers5:25 And the priest shall take the meal-offering of jealousy out of the womans hand
Numbers5:26 and the priest shall take a handful of the meal-offering
Numbers5:27 And when he hath made her drink the water
Numbers5:28 And if the woman be not defiled
Numbers5:29 This is the law of jealousy
Numbers5:30 or when the spirit of jealousy cometh upon a man
Numbers5:31 And the man shall be free from iniquity
Numbers6:1 And Jehovah spake unto Moses
Numbers6:2 Speak unto the children of Israel
Numbers6:3 he shall separate himself from wine and strong drink; he shall drink no vinegar of wine
Numbers6:4 All the days of his separation shall he eat nothing that is made of the grape-vine
Numbers6:5 All the days of his vow of separation there shall no razor come upon his head: until the days be fulfilled
Numbers6:6 All the days that he separateth himself unto Jehovah he shall not come near to a dead body.
Numbers6:7 He shall not make himself unclean for his father
Numbers6:8 All the days of his separation he is holy unto Jehovah.
Numbers6:9 And if any man die very suddenly beside him
Numbers6:10 And on the eighth day he shall bring two turtle-doves
Numbers6:11 and the priest shall offer one for a sin-offering
Numbers6:12 And he shall separate unto Jehovah the days of his separation
Numbers6:13 And this is the law of the Nazirite
Numbers6:14 and he shall offer his oblation unto Jehovah
Numbers6:15 and a basket of unleavened bread
Numbers6:16 And the priest shall present them before Jehovah
Numbers6:17 and he shall offer the ram for a sacrifice of peace-offerings unto Jehovah
Numbers6:18 And the Nazirite shall shave the head of his separation at the door of the tent of meeting
Numbers6:19 And the priest shall take the boiled shoulder of the ram
Numbers6:20 and the priest shall wave them for a wave-offering before Jehovah; this is holy for the priest
Numbers6:21 This is the law of the Nazirite who voweth
Numbers6:22 And Jehovah spake unto Moses
Numbers6:23 Speak unto Aaron and unto his sons
Numbers6:24 Jehovah bless thee
Numbers6:25 Jehovah make his face to shine upon thee
Numbers6:26 Jehovah lift up his countenance upon thee
Numbers6:27 So shall they put my name upon the children of Israel; and I will bless them.

Numbers7:79 his oblation was one silver platter

Numbers7:83 and for the sacrifice of peace-offerings

Numbers7:86 the twelve golden spoons
Numbers7:87 all the oxen for the burnt-offering twelve bullocks
Numbers7:88 and all the oxen for the sacrifice of peace-offerings twenty and four bullocks
Numbers7:89 And when Moses went into the tent of meeting to speak with him
Numbers8:1 And Jehovah spake unto Moses
Numbers8:2 Speak unto Aaron
Numbers8:3 And Aaron did so; he lighted the lamps thereof so as to give light in front of the candlestick
Numbers8:4 And this was the work of the candlestick
Numbers8:5 And Jehovah spake unto Moses
Numbers8:6 Take the Levites from among the children of Israel
Numbers8:7 And thus shalt thou do unto them
Numbers8:8 Then let them take a young bullock

Numbers8:11 and Aaron shall offer the Levites before Jehovah for a wave-offering

Numbers8:13 And thou shalt set the Levites before Aaron
Numbers8:14 Thus shalt thou separate the Levites from among the children of Israel; and the Levites shall be mine.
Numbers8:15 And after that shall the Levites go in to do the service of the tent of meeting: and thou shalt cleanse them
Numbers8:16 For they are wholly given unto me from among the children of Israel; instead of all that openeth the womb
Numbers8:17 For all the first-born among the children of Israel are mine
Numbers8:18 And I have taken the Levites instead of all the first-born among the children of Israel.
Numbers8:19 And I have given the Levites as a gift to Aaron and to his sons from among the children of Israel
Numbers8:20 Thus did Moses
Numbers8:21 And the Levites purified themselves from sin
Numbers8:22 And after that went the Levites in to do their service in the tent of meeting before Aaron

Numbers28:1 And Jehovah spake unto Moses
Numbers28:2 Command the children of Israel
Numbers28:3 And thou shalt say unto them
Numbers28:4 The one lamb shalt thou offer in the morning
Numbers28:5 and the tenth part of an ephah of fine flour for a meal-offering
Numbers28:6 It is a continual burnt-offering
Numbers28:7 And the drink-offering thereof shall be the fourth part of a hin for the one lamb: in the holy place shalt thou pour out a drink-offering of strong drink unto Jehovah.
Numbers28:8 And the other lamb shalt thou offer at even: as the meal-offering of the morning
Numbers28:9 And on the sabbath day two he-lambs a year old without blemish
Numbers28:10 this is the burnt-offering of every sabbath
Numbers28:11 And in the beginnings of your months ye shall offer a burnt-offering unto Jehovah: two young bullocks
Numbers28:12 and three tenth parts of an ephah of fine flour for a meal-offering
Numbers28:13 and a tenth part of fine flour mingled with oil for a meal-offering unto every lamb; for a burnt-offering of a sweet savor
Numbers28:14 And their drink-offerings shall be half a hin of wine for a bullock
Numbers28:15 And one he-goat for a sin-offering unto Jehovah; it shall be offered besides the continual burnt-offering
Numbers28:16 And in the first month
Numbers28:17 And on the fifteenth day of this month shall be a feast: seven days shall unleavened bread be eaten.
Numbers28:18 In the first day shall be a holy convocation: ye shall do no servile work;
Numbers28:19 but ye shall offer an offering made by fire
Numbers28:20 and their meal-offering
Numbers28:21 a tenth part shalt thou offer for every lamb of the seven lambs;
Numbers28:22 and one he-goat for a sin-offering
Numbers28:23 Ye shall offer these besides the burnt-offering of the morning
Numbers28:24 After this manner ye shall offer daily
Numbers28:25 And on the seventh day ye shall have a holy convocation: ye shall do no servile work.
Numbers28:26 Also in the day of the first-fruits
Numbers28:27 but ye shall offer a burnt-offering for a sweet savor unto Jehovah: two young bullocks
Numbers28:28 and their meal-offering
Numbers28:29 a tenth part for every lamb of the seven lambs;
Numbers28:30 one he-goat
Numbers28:31 Besides the continual burnt-offering

Numbers29:2 And ye shall offer a burnt-offering for a sweet savor unto Jehovah: one young bullock
Numbers29:3 and their meal-offering
Numbers29:4 and one tenth part for every lamb of the seven lambs;
Numbers29:5 and one he-goat for a sin-offering
Numbers29:6 besides the burnt-offering of the new moon
Numbers29:7 And on the tenth day of this seventh month ye shall have a holy convocation; and ye shall afflict your souls: ye shall do no manner of work;

Numbers29:14 and their meal-offering

Numbers29:16 and one he-goat for a sin-offering

Numbers29:19 and one he-goat for a sin-offering; besides the continual burnt-offering

Numbers29:30 and their meal-offering and their drink-offerings for the bullocks

Numbers30:4 and her father heareth her vow
Numbers30:5 But if her father disallow her in the day that he heareth
Numbers30:6 And if she be married to a husband
Numbers30:7 and her husband hear it
Numbers30:8 But if her husband disallow her in the day that he heareth it
Numbers30:9 But the vow of a widow
Numbers30:10 And if she vowed in her husbands house
Numbers30:11 and her husband heard it
Numbers30:12 But if her husband made them null and void in the day that he heard them
Numbers30:13 Every vow
Numbers30:14 But if her husband altogether hold his peace at her from day to day
Numbers30:15 But if he shall make them null and void after that he hath heard them
Numbers30:16 These are the statutes

Numbers35:1 And Jehovah spake unto Moses in the plains of Moab by the Jordan at Jericho
Numbers35:2 Command the children of Israel
Numbers35:3 And the cities shall they have to dwell in; and their suburbs shall be for their cattle
Numbers35:4 And the suburbs of the cities
Numbers35:5 And ye shall measure without the city for the east side two thousand cubits
Numbers35:6 And the cities which ye shall give unto the Levites
Numbers35:7 All the cities which ye shall give to the Levites shall be forty and eight cities; them shall ye give with their suburbs.
Numbers35:8 And concerning the cities which ye shall give of the possession of the children of Israel
Numbers35:9 And Jehovah spake unto Moses
Numbers35:10 Speak unto the children of Israel
Numbers35:11 then ye shall appoint you cities to be cities of refuge for you
Numbers35:12 And the cities shall be unto you for refuge from the avenger
Numbers35:13 And the cities which ye shall give shall be for you six cities of refuge.
Numbers35:14 Ye shall give three cities beyond the Jordan
Numbers35:15 For the children of Israel
Numbers35:16 But if he smote him with an instrument of iron
Numbers35:17 And if he smote him with a stone in the hand
Numbers35:18 Or if he smote him with a weapon of wood in the hand
Numbers35:19 The avenger of blood shall himself put the murderer to death: when he meeteth him
Numbers35:20 And if he thrust him of hatred
Numbers35:21 or in enmity smote him with his hand
Numbers35:22 But if he thrust him suddenly without enmity
Numbers35:23 or with any stone
Numbers35:24 then the congregation shall judge between the smiter and the avenger of blood according to these ordinances;
Numbers35:25 and the congregation shall deliver the manslayer out of the hand of the avenger of blood
Numbers35:26 But if the manslayer shall at any time go beyond the border of his city of refuge
Numbers35:27 and the avenger of blood find him without the border of his city of refuge
Numbers35:28 because he should have remained in his city of refuge until the death of the high priest: but after the death of the high priest the manslayer shall return into the land of his possession.

Judges18:3 When they were by the house of Micah
Judges18:4 And he said unto them
Judges18:5 And they said unto him
Judges18:6 And the priest said unto them
Judges18:7 Then the five men departed
Judges18:8 And they came unto their brethren to Zorah and Eshtaol: and their brethren said unto them
Judges18:9 And they said
Judges18:10 When ye go
Judges18:11 And there set forth from thence of the family of the Danites
Judges18:12 And they went up
Judges18:13 And they passed thence unto the hill-country of Ephraim

Judges18:15 And they turned aside thither
Judges18:16 And the six hundred men girt with their weapons of war
Judges18:17 And the five men that went to spy out the land went up
Judges18:18 And when these went into Micahs house
Judges18:19 And they said unto him
Judges18:20 And the priests heart was glad
Judges18:21 So they turned and departed
Judges18:22 When they were a good way from the house of Micah
Judges18:23 And they cried unto the children of Dan. And they turned their faces
Judges18:24 And he said
Judges18:25 And the children of Dan said unto him

Judges18:27 And they took that which Micah had made
Judges18:28 And there was no deliverer
Judges18:29 And they called the name of the city Dan
Judges18:30 And the children of Dan set up for themselves the graven image: and Jonathan
Judges18:31 So they set them up Micahs graven image which he made

Judges20:44 And there fell of Benjamin eighteen thousand men; all these were men of valor.
Judges20:45 And they turned and fled toward the wilderness unto the rock of Rimmon: and they gleaned of them in the highways five thousand men
Judges20:46 So that all who fell that day of Benjamin were twenty and five thousand men that drew the sword; all these were men of valor.
Judges20:47 But six hundred men turned and fled toward the wilderness unto the rock of Rimmon
Judges20:48 And the men of Israel turned again upon the children of Benjamin

2Samuel22:1 And David spake unto Jehovah the words of this song in the day that Jehovah delivered him out of the hand of all his enemies
2Samuel22:2 and he said
2Samuel22:3 God
2Samuel22:4 I will call upon Jehovah
2Samuel22:5 For the waves of death compassed me; The floods of ungodliness made me afraid:
2Samuel22:6 The cords of Sheol were round about me; The snares of death came upon me.
2Samuel22:7 In my distress I called upon Jehovah; Yea
2Samuel22:8 Then the earth shook and trembled
2Samuel22:9 There went up a smoke out of his nostrils
2Samuel22:10 He bowed the heavens also
2Samuel22:11 And he rode upon a cherub
2Samuel22:12 And he made darkness pavilions round about him
2Samuel22:13 At the brightness before him Coals of fire were kindled.
2Samuel22:14 Jehovah thundered from heaven
2Samuel22:15 And he sent out arrows
2Samuel22:16 Then the channels of the sea appeared
2Samuel22:17 He sent from on high
2Samuel22:18 He delivered me from my strong enemy
2Samuel22:19 They came upon me in the day of my calamity; But Jehovah was my stay.
2Samuel22:20 He brought me forth also into a large place; He delivered me
2Samuel22:21 Jehovah rewarded me according to my righteousness; According to the cleanness of my hands hath he recompensed me.
2Samuel22:22 For I have kept the ways of Jehovah
2Samuel22:23 For all his ordinances were before me; And as for his statutes
2Samuel22:24 I was also perfect toward him; And I kept myself from mine iniquity.
2Samuel22:25 Therefore hath Jehovah recompensed me according to my righteousness
2Samuel22:26 With the merciful thou wilt show thyself merciful; With the perfect man thou wilt show thyself perfect;
2Samuel22:27 With the pure thou wilt show thyself pure; And with the perverse thou wilt show thyself froward.
2Samuel22:28 And the afflicted people thou wilt save; But thine eyes are upon the haughty
2Samuel22:29 For thou art my lamp
2Samuel22:30 For by thee I run upon a troop; By my God do I leap over a wall.
2Samuel22:31 As for God
2Samuel22:32 For who is God
2Samuel22:33 God is my strong fortress; And he guideth the perfect in his way.
2Samuel22:34 He maketh his feet like hinds feet
2Samuel22:35 He teacheth my hands to war
2Samuel22:36 Thou hast also given me the shield of thy salvation; And thy gentleness hath made me great.
2Samuel22:37 Thou hast enlarged my steps under me; And my feet have not slipped.
2Samuel22:38 I have pursued mine enemies
2Samuel22:39 And I have consumed them
2Samuel22:40 For thou hast girded me with strength unto the battle; Thou hast subdued under me those that rose up against me.
2Samuel22:41 Thou hast also made mine enemies turn their backs unto me
2Samuel22:42 They looked
2Samuel22:43 Then did I beat them small as the dust of the earth
2Samuel22:44 Thou also hast delivered me from the strivings of my people; Thou hast kept me to be the head of the nations: A people whom I have not known shall serve me.
2Samuel22:45 The foreigners shall submit themselves unto me: As soon as they hear of me
2Samuel22:46 The foreigners shall fade away
2Samuel22:47 Jehovah liveth; And blessed be my rock; And exalted be God
2Samuel22:48 Even the God that executeth vengeance for me
2Samuel22:49 And that bringeth me forth from mine enemies: Yea
2Samuel22:50 Therefore I will give thanks unto thee
2Samuel22:51 Great deliverance giveth he to his king
